title: Geomatics IV
outline: The nature and concept of satellite and airborne remote sensing: advanced spectral and spatial image transforms, advanced thematic image classification methods, and an introduction to data fusion and hyperspectral image analysis concepts. Processing of ALS data, including: data filtering, segmentation, object classification and 3D modelling. Photogrammetric production concepts including: aerial triangulation, DTM and ortho image production, pictometry, 3D reconstruction and visualisation.
dp_requirements: Attendance at and completion of all assignments with a minimum average of 50%, a minimum class test average of 35%.
assessment: Written Tests count 15%, Practical Tests and practical assignments count 25%, examination of 3 hours counts 60% (sub-minimum 40%).
